text: My biggest like is the Chicken Burrito-  OMG, it's not a weekend unless I have a Juanitos burrito with fresh chicken, fresh cilantro,, fresh cebollos, mmmm.   They are SO good, I can't bring myself to order anything else!    The food is great, the kitchen is busy, the family is very accommodating, and will add/delete any ingredients.  The restaurant is..um...well, booths that are VERY well worn, with bumps and divots of wear.  The neighborhood is such that you should lock up your vehicle; common sense, right?   The homeless there are "regulars"   The food is well worth navigating the current construction.
